assessment_objectives.objective: requirements for key generation, distribution, storage, access, and destruction are defined.
protected storage for cryptographic keys is provided using organization-defined criteria.
cryptographic keys are established in the system in accordance with organization-defined key management requirements.
cryptographic keys are managed in the system in accordance with organization-defined key management requirements.
cryptographic keys are established in the system in accordance with the following key management requirements: <A.03.13.10.ODP[01]: requirements>.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: Guidance: At a minimum, establish a policy and procedure in line with the latest Cryptographic key management guidance

assessment_objectives.objective: cryptographic keys are managed in the system in accordance with the following key management requirements: <A.03.13.10.ODP[01]: requirements>.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: Guidance: At a minimum, establish a policy and procedure in line with the latest Cryptographic key management guidance
